text: URGENT: Riverside Apartments has 3 seniors on the second floor who need wheelchair-accessible transport to North Shelter before the road closes.
I have two accessible vans near West High School and can do pickup runs now.
Need insulin cooler kit for evacuee arriving at North Shelter. Current fridge is full and this is time sensitive.
County Clinic has four insulin cooler kits and I can bring one to North Shelter tonight.
Community Kitchen can send 80 shelf-stable meals if someone confirms drop-off at East Gym.
Reminder that volunteer badges are on the table by the entrance.
Critical: family of 5 with infant stranded on Oak Street, no vehicle, water rising. Need immediate pickup.
Oxygen concentrator is available at Clinic B. Can be transported to any shelter that needs it.
East Gym now confirmed at capacity — 120 cots occupied. Redirecting all new arrivals to North Shelter.
I have 200 water bottles and ready to deliver anywhere in zone 3 right now.
Elderly man at Pine Court needs medication — has not taken blood pressure pills in 24 hours. URGENT.
Great work everyone. Proud of this team.
